residential.meta_title: Colorado Springs Residential Electrician | Freedom Electric & Lighting
residential.meta_description: Licensed Master Electrician (ME.3000991). Same-day estimates, flat-rate pricing, 500+ local jobs completed. Call Joe at (719) 437-7802.
residential.hero_h1: Trusted Master Electrician for Your Colorado Springs Home
residential.hero_sub: From flickering outlets and overloaded panels to EV chargers, hot tubs, and full remodels — Joe and the Freedom Electric team protect your home, your family, and your wallet. Same-day estimates. Flat-rate quotes. No surprises.
residential.hero_card_sub: Same-day response. No pressure. No surprise pricing.

panel-upgrade.meta_title: Electrical Panel Upgrade Colorado Springs | Freedom Electric & Lighting
panel-upgrade.meta_description: Upgrade your electrical panel safely. Licensed Master Electrician, code-compliant work, flat-rate quotes. Free estimate from a Colorado Springs local — (719) 437-7802.
panel-upgrade.hero_h1: Upgrade Your Electrical Panel Before Your Home Outgrows It
panel-upgrade.hero_sub: If your panel is older than your kids, your breakers keep tripping, or you're adding an EV charger, hot tub, or remodel — your home is asking for more power than it was built for. Free estimate. Locked flat-rate quote. Code-compliant work from a licensed Master Electrician.
panel-upgrade.hero_card_sub: We come out, look at it, and give you an honest flat-rate quote.

commercial.meta_title: Commercial Electrician Colorado Springs | Freedom Electric & Lighting

commercial.hero_h1: Commercial Electrical Work That Keeps Your Doors Open
commercial.hero_sub: Lights, power, parking lots, retail buildouts, tenant improvements, code upgrades. A licensed Master Electrician you can actually reach — on time, on budget, code-compliant. We work around your schedule so your business never stops.
commercial.hero_card_sub: Tell us the scope. We respond same business day with a clear plan.
